description_long: This is a compact, tracked military vehicle with a low, angular armored superstructure and a prominent forward-mounted cannon. The vehicle features continuous track systems on both sides, providing enhanced mobility over rough terrain. Its exterior is painted in a matte olive drab color, with a red star insignia visible on the side panels, suggesting military use. The front of the vehicle is heavily armored, with a sloped glacis plate and a small, centrally mounted gun barrel protruding from the armored housing. The rear section appears to have a sloped engine cover and a rear extension, possibly for additional equipment or support. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and firepower in a compact form factor.
description: A compact, olive drab tracked military vehicle with angular armor and a forward-mounted cannon, featuring a red star insignia on the side. Its design emphasizes protection and mobility with continuous tracks and a sloped armored front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, the red star insignia, and the continuous track system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sloped engine cover, rear extension, and the armored back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the red star insignia and track system visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the sloped glacis plate, centrally mounted cannon, and the armored front profile.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible forward-mounted cannon integrated into the armored superstructure.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating, especially prominent on the front and sides; sloped glacis plate for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red star insignia on both side panels.
